examples.name: Show ip arp summary output with resolved and incomplete counts
examples.input:
N95_1# show ip arp summary

IP ARP Table - Adjacency Summary

  Resolved   : 12
  Incomplete : 0 (Throttled : 0)
  Unknown    : 0
  Total      : 12

examples.name: Imported from Genie ShowIpArpSummaryVrfAll (equal)
examples.input:
N95_1# show ip arp summary vrf all

IP ARP Table - Adjacency Summary

  Resolved   : 12
  Incomplete : 0 (Throttled : 0)
  Unknown    : 0
  Total      : 12
